headline: General Mills: GLP-1 And Consumer Fears Are Overblown (Rating Upgrade)
summary: General Mills (GIS) upgraded to Strong Buy: DCF shows upside, high yield, FY27 pivot, and limited GLP-1 risk despite headwinds. See more here.

headline: Jim Cramer on General Mills: “A Lot of These Companies Just Have to Combine”
summary: General Mills, Inc. (NYSE:GIS) was among Jim Cramer’s stock calls on Mad Money recently.
